meta.title: Mouse Mammary Tumour Virus RNA-dependent DNA Polymerase: requirements and Products

abstractHtml:
Mouse mammary tumour virus contains an RNA-dependent DNA polymerase. The enzyme requirements and physical properties of the reaction products are similar to those of other RNA tumour viruses, despite the unique characteristics of the virus in other properties.

* Present address: Cancer Research Laboratory, 230 Warren Hall, University of California, Berkeley, California 94720, U.S.A.
